topic: Leech phototaxis apparatus — start of trial
image_prompt: SVG: glass aquarium half covered by black light-proof lid (dark side right) lit by desk lamp from upper left; leeches swimming in water; digital timer showing 00:46.
SVG: same leech aquarium scene after several minutes; most leeches now clustered on the dark side; timer reads 06:41.

topic: Cricket chirping apparatus — three temperature-controlled tanks
image_prompt: SVG: three glass terraria side-by-side labelled 15 °C, 20 °C, 25 °C; each contains soil, leaves, one cricket and a wall thermometer with mercury level matching the labelled temperature.

SVG scatter graph of the students' mean cricket data (deliberately unlabelled axes, as the task asks the student to supply labels). x-axis 0 to 40 with ticks every 5; y-axis 0 to 180 with ticks every 20; three plotted points at (15, 83), (20, 127), (25, 168) — the Table A means for 15, 20, 25 deg C.

topic: Woodlice — close-up photos with common names
image_prompt: SVG: two woodlice illustrations (top view and side view) with central label block: Woodlice / Pill bugs / Potato bugs / Roly-polies / Slaters.

SVG icon grid of 15 lab items: Choice chamber, Green leaves, Light meter, Gravel, Cucumber, Carrot, Lamp, Thermometer, Woodlice, Four types of paper with different transparency, Apple, Sand, Twigs, Pebbles, Potato. 'Not to scale' label.
SVG woodland food web showing Owl, Fox, Rabbit, Badger, Rat, Worm, Woodlice and Various types of plant material, joined by white prey-to-predator arrows on a stylised forest background.

SVG qualitative predator-prey oscillation graph: Population (y, no numeric scale) vs Time (x, no numeric scale). Tall dashed curve = Woodlice (prey) with three sharp peaks; shorter solid curve = Rats (predator) with three broader peaks that lag slightly behind each woodlice peak. Includes title 'Changing population size for a population of woodlice and a population of rats' and a Key (dashed = Woodlice, solid = Rats).

SVG 2x3 panel grid of biofortified crops with year badges: Maize (2012, Beta-carotene, Zambia), Millet (2012, Iron, India), Wheat (2013, Zinc, Pakistan), Sweet potato (2007, Beta-carotene, Uganda), Beans (2012, Iron, Rwanda), Cassava (2011, Beta-carotene, Nigeria).

SVG flowchart of GM-plant biotechnology steps with given Step 1 boxes (Genes cut from species / Restriction enzymes cut plasmid) converging into Step 2 (genes inserted), Step 3 (plasmid into bacterium), Step 4 (bacterium inserts genes into plant cell), Step 5 (modified plant cell grown into individual plants). Side mini-icons of DNA helix, plasmid, bacterium, plant cell.

topic: Vitamin A deficiency — world map + symptoms
image_prompt: SVG: stylised world map shaded by Vitamin A deficiency severity (mild=purple, moderate=orange, severe=red, no data=blue) with legend and 'VITAMIN A DEFICIENCY' title; symptom panel below with four black circles (Blindness/Night blindness eye, Weakened immune function virus, Cancer glow, Birth defects fetus) connecting via lines to a human silhouette.
